Given answer key says C) 2 and solution says 252-48=204. Let the expression be: $(18 \times 14 - 6 \times 8) \times ? \div (488 \div 4 - 20) = ?$. Actually the solution value 204 vs answer 2 suggests $? = \frac{204}{102} = 2$.
